##NAMES=Cuspidine
##RRUFFID=R140776
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca_8_(Si_2_O_7_)_2_F_4_
##LOCALITY=Caspar quarry, Bellerberg volcano, Ettringen, Mayen, Eifel, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Ch. and H. Schäfer
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless to gray, associated with grossular/andradite, melilite and rankinite (R140775).
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R140776
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 10.899 b: 10.525 c: 7.524 alpha: 90 beta: 109.52 gamma: 90 volume: 813.5 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
